allow: Bash(for script in cleanup-npm-global.sh fetch-github-projects.sh lib/fetch-github-lib.sh)

Bash(shellcheck experimental/app-nuke.sh experimental/daily-trim.sh experimental/disk-master.sh ci-quality-gates.sh lib/mu-helpers.sh analyze-malware-sandbox/check-alpine-version.sh analyze-malware-sandbox/shared/analyze.sh macos-setup/lib/common.sh)

Bash(sed -i '' '350s/.*/    # Exclude zsh scripts \(shell-specific syntax fails bash -n\)\\n    if head -1 "$file" 2>\\/dev\\/null | grep -qE '\\''^#!.*zsh'\\''; then local_is_bash=false; fi\\n    [[ "$local_is_bash" == "true" ]] || continue/' .git/hooks/pre-commit)

Bash(sed -i '' '401s/.*/    # Exclude zsh scripts\\n        if head -1 "$file" 2>\\/dev\\/null | grep -qE '\\''^#!.*zsh'\\''; then sc_is_bash=false; fi\\n        [[ "$sc_is_bash" == "true" ]] || continue/' .git/hooks/pre-commit)

Bash(shellcheck macos-setup/lib/ui.sh macos-setup/setup-components/90-mcp-claude-code.sh mu.sh purge-identity/lib/common.sh purge-identity/lib/processing.sh purge-identity/lib/ui.sh reset-all-repos.sh schedule-claude.sh scorch-repo.sh squash-commits.sh starter-kit/common.sh validate-script-compliance.sh)

Bash(shellcheck -e "SC1091,SC2034,SC2129,SC2155,SC2162,SC2097,SC2098,SC2015,SC2317,SC2064" macos-setup/lib/ui.sh mu.sh purge-identity/lib/common.sh purge-identity/lib/processing.sh purge-identity/lib/ui.sh reset-all-repos.sh schedule-claude.sh scorch-repo.sh squash-commits.sh starter-kit/common.sh validate-script-compliance.sh macos-setup/setup-components/90-mcp-claude-code.sh)
Bash(python3 -c "import hashlib; hashlib.scrypt\(b'test', salt=b'a'*16, n=32768, r=8, p=1, dklen=32\); print\('scrypt ok'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "import hashlib; hashlib.scrypt\(b'test', salt=b'a'*16, n=32768, r=8, p=1, dklen=32\); print\('scrypt ok'\)")
